summary: Completed testing of Tournament-Match Integration feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Match creation requires tournament_id and category, TournamentDetails page displays matches grouped by category with filter functionality.

fixed_during_testing.issue: Existing match in DB had null tournament_id and missing category field (legacy data)
fixed_during_testing.action: Deleted legacy match to allow GET /api/matches to work correctly

issues: Same player can be selected for both Player1 and Player2 - no validation (minor)

seed_data_creation: Created test admin user (admin/admin123) for authentication testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tournament-Match integration is complete. 5 tournaments and 2 matches exist in DB. Test admin user created: admin/admin123. TournamentDetails page accessible at /tournaments/:id with Results and Matches tabs.
features_verified: POST /api/matches - creates match with tournament_id and category (required)
GET /api/matches - returns matches with tournament_id and category fields
GET /api/tournaments/{id}/matches - returns matches grouped by category
GET /api/tournaments/{id}/results - returns tournament results by category
AdminMatches form - Tournament and Category dropdowns work
TournamentDetails page - Results and Matches tabs with category grouping
Category filter in TournamentDetails Matches tab - filters by category
